name: The world is flooding
description:
The world drowned a century ago. The rain never truly stopped. Entire continents sank beneath the sea, while the last survivors fled to mountains, ruins, or built floating settlements atop rusted ships and broken dreams.

Now, fractured factions rule what’s left. The Sea Lords raid across the waves. The Deep Concord sails in search of balance. The Drowned Faith preaches that the flood was divine will. Radioactive zones glow beneath the waves — whispering of the old world’s sins.

The sea is no longer just water — it's kingdom, battleground, and grave.

You are a traveler, scavenger, soldier, or something stranger — your role is your own to choose.

Ships creak in the fog. Drones hum overhead. Ancient towers loom from the deep like the bones of dead gods. Somewhere out there, the Sea King’s fleet draws near...

This is a world of rust, salt, rain, and survival.

What will you do?
creator: Antonio--090909
